'''鈭歽-g-sh-w''' ('''kayagshewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pharm|pharm]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-g-sh-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pharm|pharm]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歽-g-sh-w
|-
! Lemma
| kayagshewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyagshewoko|thiyagshewoko]] || [[word:jiyagshewoko|jiyagshewoko]] || [[word:shiyagshewoko|shiyagshewoko]] || [[word:kiyagshewoko|kiyagshewoko]]
